goal: The dual mail stack is formally documented as an intentional two-owner architecture with a single adapter contract per stack (keep-both), and REQ-16 (no silent fallback, runtime-discoverable authoritative stack) is implemented.
why: REQ-16 today is an architectural risk, not a live bug — mail_accounts records no stack discriminator. This phase makes the two-owner boundary explicit and enforced so a future change cannot silently route company mail through the wrong stack.
success_criteria: ADR-004 exists, is dated, names keep-both, and ties rationale to VAL-4 and VAL-5 (REQ-15).
mail_accounts has a mail_stack discriminator column ('imap'|'outlook', default 'imap') applied via an additive tracked migration; the authoritative stack is discoverable at runtime (REQ-16).
Each mail stack has one ownership-annotated adapter contract (ADR-004 comment on smtp.ts, imap.ts, outlook.ts).
The agent send and schedule paths assert the resolved account's stack is 'imap' and return a human-readable error otherwise — no silent cross-stack fallback (REQ-16).
No route calls both stacks for the same operation.
npx tsc --noEmit passes and existing mail/agent tests pass.

tasks.title: Record ADR-004 (the keep-both decision)
acceptance_criteria: ADR-004-mail-stack.md exists, dated 2026-06-17, Phase 2, Status Accepted.
Names the chosen path explicitly as keep-both (not converge-to-Graph, not converge-to-IMAP).
Context/Decision cite VAL-5 (12-mailbox IMAP fleet, mailboxes.ts:31-47) and VAL-4 (Graph delegated OAuth) as why neither stack can be deleted autonomously.
Declares two owners: IMAP/SMTP authoritative for company mailboxes; Outlook user-personal drafting/send only (D-02).
Alternatives considered rejects converge-to-Graph and converge-to-IMAP honestly.
Notes/Consequences state REQ-16 is enforced by the mail_stack column (Task 2) and the assertion (Task 3).
tasks.action: Copy the structure of .planning/decisions/_template.md and match the prose density of ADR-003. State the decision as one declarative sentence first, then expand. Pull cited facts from phase-2-scout.md and phase-2-context.md; every cited path must already exist in the repo.

tasks.title: Add the mail_stack discriminator (migration + plumb-through + ownership comments)
acceptance_criteria: 0012_mail_stack.sql adds mail_stack text not null default 'imap' to mail_accounts with a check constraint in ('imap','outlook'), using add column if not exists (idempotent).
Migration is independently re-runnable and applied via Supabase/CI flow, never hand-applied (constitution, D-05).
MailAccount interface gains mailStack: 'imap' | 'outlook'; AccountRow gains mail_stack: string; toMailAccount maps row.mail_stack to mailStack defaulting to 'imap'.
smtp.ts, imap.ts, and outlook.ts each carry an ADR-004 authoritative-stack ownership comment.
tasks.action: Write 0012_mail_stack.sql mirroring the header-comment and RLS style of 0011_agent_traces.sql; add the column idempotently and a guarded check constraint via a do-block that swallows duplicate_object. In accounts.ts add the mailStack field to MailAccount, mail_stack to AccountRow, map it in toMailAccount, and add mail_stack to the listAccounts select list. Add ADR-004 ownership comments to smtp.ts/imap.ts (imap) and outlook.ts (outlook, user-personal only).

tasks.title: Enforce REQ-16: agent send/schedule asserts 'imap', no silent fallback
acceptance_criteria: In executeConfirmedAction send_email case, after the non-null account check, if account.mailStack !== 'imap' it throws a human-readable Error naming the mailbox and does not fall back to any other send path.
scheduleEmail in scheduled.ts applies the same assertion right after its existing null-check, protecting all callers.
Thrown errors are operator-readable sentences with no raw IMAP/Graph exception leakage.
executeConfirmedAction imports sendMail only from @/lib/mail/smtp, never from @/lib/microsoft/outlook.
npx tsc --noEmit passes and existing mail/agent test suites pass.
tasks.action: Add an account.mailStack !== 'imap' guard with a human-readable throw in the send_email case of executeConfirmedAction.ts and inside scheduleEmail in scheduled.ts. Add an ADR-004 / REQ-16 comment above each guard. Do not touch the IMAP read tools.
